name: /standards-add: writes an audit-log entry to .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl with event:standards-add, source_id, url
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep -E "standards-add" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && grep -E "https://x.com" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
